about: Hi! My name is Andrea and I am currently studying Information Technology. I enjoy transforming concepts into completed projects that deliver solutions to problems and create satisfaction for users. I have been using Java and SQL and HTML and CSS. I use VS Code, Android Studio, and GitHub to make and keep my projects going. I want to get better at what I know. I want to find out what I need to work on to be the best I can be. My goal is to be a developer who makes applications that are useful and work well. I enjoy design work during my free time from programming. My design approach focuses on creating user interfaces which maintain simplicity while providing operational efficiency.
